moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages Heat Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stages are in full swing, with the Round of 32 concluding today and the Round of 16 kicking off this weekend.

angles.name: Round of 16 anticipation
angles.copy: Today marks the end of the Round of 32, and then it's straight into the World Cup Round of 16! Who are you backing to make it through?

angles.name: UK team focus
angles.copy: If England made it through, the dream is still alive! The World Cup knockout stages are relentless, with the Round of 16 starting this weekend. Every game counts!

moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 began yesterday, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to the All England Club.

angles.name: First week excitement
angles.copy: Game, Set, Match! Wimbledon's first week is underway, serving up aces and upsets. Who are you rooting for on the grass courts?

angles.name: British hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are back! Wimbledon 2026 is here, and we're ready for all the drama. Any dark horses for the British contingent this year?

moments.title: Tour de France Grand Départ
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins with its Grand Départ in Barcelona on July 4, with the team presentation happening on July 2.

angles.name: Pre-race buzz
angles.copy: Get ready for the peloton! The Tour de France team presentation is just two days away in Barcelona, before the race officially kicks off on July 4th. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Cycling excitement
angles.copy: Three weeks of gruelling climbs and thrilling sprints are almost here! The Tour de France 2026 starts Saturday. Will a new champion emerge?

moments.title: Lytham Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival, a major music event on the Lancashire coast, begins tomorrow, running until July 5th with a diverse lineup.

angles.name: Festival is on
angles.copy: Lytham Festival kicks off tomorrow! The Lancashire coast is about to get loud with some incredible artists over the next few days. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Local excitement
angles.copy: Planning a trip to Lytham Festival this week? Get ready for five days of fantastic music starting July 1st! The countdown is officially over.

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival
moments.blurb: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival, celebrating jazz, soul, and funk, takes place this weekend from July 3-5 in Glynde Place, East Sussex.

angles.name: Jazz Soul Funk Weekend
angles.copy: Love Supreme Jazz Festival is this weekend! Get ready for a soulful blend of jazz, funk, and soul in the beautiful Sussex countryside. Pure vibes incoming!

angles.name: Festival vibe
angles.copy: Who's heading to Love Supreme this weekend? Three days of world-class music and good times. Let the jazz, soul, and funk flow!

moments.title: New Madonna Album 'Confessions II'
moments.blurb: Madonna is set to release her new album, 'Confessions II', on July 3rd, a highly anticipated follow-up to her iconic 'Confessions on a Dance Floor'.

angles.name: New music Friday
angles.copy: Queen of Pop alert! Madonna drops 'Confessions II' this Friday. Get ready to hit the dance floor all over again!

angles.name: Anticipated release
angles.copy: It's been a long wait! Madonna's 'Confessions II' arrives July 3rd. What are your hopes for her latest dancefloor masterpiece?

moments.title: Deep Purple Release 'Splat!'
moments.blurb: Rock legends Deep Purple are releasing their 24th studio album, 'Splat!', on July 3rd.

angles.name: Rock legends return
angles.copy: Deep Purple are back! Their 24th studio album, 'Splat!', lands this Friday. Ready for some new rock anthems from the legends?

angles.name: New music Friday rock
angles.copy: Friday means new music, and Deep Purple are delivering with 'Splat!' What's your favourite Deep Purple track of all time?

moments.title: The Rolling Stones New Album 'Foreign Tongues'
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones are set to release their new album, 'Foreign Tongues', on July 10th.

angles.name: Stones new music
angles.copy: More new music from rock royalty! The Rolling Stones drop their album 'Foreign Tongues' on July 10th. Who's excited to hear it?

angles.name: Anticipated rock album
angles.copy: Another week, another legendary band with new material! The Rolling Stones are back with 'Foreign Tongues' next Friday. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

moments.title: Happy 81st to Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday tomorrow, July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very happy 81st birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! What's your go-to Blondie anthem?

angles.name: Music legend
angles.copy: Still as cool as ever! Debbie Harry turns 81 tomorrow. Celebrate with your favourite Blondie track!

moments.title: Happy 86th to Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles song featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

angles.name: Drummer icon
angles.copy: One of the greatest drummers of all time! Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th next week. Send him some love!

moments.title: Happy 51st to Jack White
moments.blurb: Musician, singer, and producer Jack White, known for The White Stripes and The Raconteurs, turns 51 on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock innovator
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday to the incredible Jack White on July 9th! What's your favourite White Stripes or solo track?

angles.name: Modern rock icon
angles.copy: From The White Stripes to solo brilliance, Jack White has given us so much! He turns 51 next week. Celebrate with some raw rock!

moments.title: Happy 72nd to Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, lead singer of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Synth-pop legend
angles.copy: It's a big one for Neil Tennant! The Pet Shop Boys frontman turns 72 on July 10th. What's your favourite PSB track?

angles.name: Electronic music pioneer
angles.copy: Happy birthday next Friday to Neil Tennant! The voice behind countless synth-pop hits. Which Pet Shop Boys song always gets you moving?

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin Across UK
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are starting this week and next across various parts of the UK, bringing longer breaks for families.

angles.name: School's out for summer
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially kicking off for many schools across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Local summer plans
angles.copy: For those in Wales, Devon, and across the UK, the school summer holidays are either here or just around the corner! Where are you heading for your break?
